title: Sunset Beach Walk
description: Walk hand-in-hand on a quiet beach at sunset, collect seashells and watch the sky change.

title: Starlit Rooftop Night
description: Fairy lights, soft music, cozy blanket — stargaze and talk until late.

title: Candlelit Home Dinner
description: Cook your favourite meal, set candles, soft music — slow conversation night.

title: Sunrise Breakfast Date
description: Wake up early, watch sunrise and have breakfast together at a peaceful spot.

title: Road Trip With No Plan
description: Just the two of us, a playlist, and roads to explore — spontaneous and free.

title: Cozy Movie Marathon
description: Pajamas, blankets, our favorite snacks and a lineup of films we both love.

title: Rainy Day Walk
description: Walk in the rain under one umbrella, laugh like kids and share hot chai.

title: Matching Outfits Day
description: Pick matching outfits and take silly pictures all day long.

title: Our Dream Home Vision
description: Design a moodboard and plan our dream home, room by room.

title: Cooking Together Night
description: Try a new recipe together and make a beautiful mess while laughing.

title: Hillstation Staycation
description: Cozy cottage, warm drinks, foggy mornings and long walks on hills.

title: Write Each Other Letters
description: Exchange handwritten letters and read them aloud with tea.

title: Dance In The Living Room
description: Turn on our song and dance like no one’s watching.

title: Picnic In The Park
description: A basket, a blanket and a lazy afternoon in a sunlit park.

title: Prank Each Other Playfully
description: A harmless cute prank day and laughing about it afterwards.

title: Recreate Our First Date
description: Try to recreate our first date: same vibe, similar jokes and the same smiles.

title: Surprise Love Notes
description: Hide small love notes in places she’ll find during the day.

title: Plan Our Big Trip
description: Pick a dream destination and plan every detail together — flights to food.

title: Bike Ride To Nowhere
description: Long bike ride along quiet roads, stopping wherever we feel like.

title: Bookstore Date
description: Get lost in a bookstore, pick a book for each other and read snippets.

title: Volunteer Together
description: Spend a day volunteering for a cause we both care about.

title: Karaoke Night At Home
description: Sing our hearts out to cheesy songs and laugh at our performances.

title: Sunset Picnic On A Hill
description: Wrap in a blanket, watch the sun dip and share a quiet moment.

title: Create A Time Capsule
description: Write notes to each other, hide small tokens, and bury a time capsule.

title: City Lights Night Drive
description: Night drive through the city, stop for late-night dessert and watch lights.

title: Sunrise Yoga Together
description: Gentle morning stretches or yoga together at sunrise.

title: Start A Tiny Garden
description: Grow plants together — a small garden of memories and green mornings.

title: Make A Couple Playlist
description: Create a playlist that tells our story through songs we both love.

title: Photo Booth Day
description: Set up a mini photo booth and take funny themed pictures.

title: Surprise Picnic On Balcony
description: Turn balcony into a little cafe with lights, snacks and music.

title: Weekend Cabin Escape
description: A quiet cabin, wood fire, board games and long talks by the window.

title: Make A Scrapbook
description: Collect tickets, photos and write notes together in a scrapbook.

title: Zipline / Adventure Park
description: Try an adventure activity together and cheer each other on.

title: Celebrate A Big Milestone
description: Plan a meaningful celebration for an important milestone in our lives.

title: Late-night Drive & Coffee
description: Drive with the windows down and stop for coffee near an open view.

title: Bake A Cake Together
description: Bake something silly together, decorate badly and eat it anyway.

title: Dance Under The Moon
description: Slow dance outside late at night under the moonlight with soft music.

title: Start A Small Tradition
description: Create a small recurring tradition that is ours alone — weekly or yearly.
